member.name: P:Nano.Data.Abstractions.Config.CacheOptions.MaxEntries
member.summary: Max Entries. The maximum number of cache entries.

member.name: P:Nano.Data.Abstractions.Config.CacheOptions.ExpirationTimeout
member.summary: Expiration Timoeout. The number of seconds before a cache entry expires.

member.name: P:Nano.Data.Abstractions.Config.CacheOptions.ExpirationScanFrequency
member.summary: Expiration Scan Frequency. The expiration scan interval in seconds.

member.name: P:Nano.Data.Abstractions.Config.CacheOptions.ExpirationMode
member.summary: Expiration Mode. The mode for cache expiration. Absolute or Sliding.

member.name: P:Nano.Data.Abstractions.Config.CacheOptions.IgnoredTableNames
member.summary: Ignored Table Names. The table names that is ignored from the cache.

member.name: F:Nano.Data.Abstractions.Config.Enums.CacheExpireMode.Absolute
member.summary: Defines absolute expiration. The item will expire after the expiration timeout.

member.name: F:Nano.Data.Abstractions.Config.Enums.CacheExpireMode.Sliding
member.summary: Defines sliding expiration. The expiration timeout will be refreshed on every access.

member.name: F:Nano.Data.Abstractions.Config.Enums.CacheExpireMode.NeverRemove
member.summary: If you do not specify an absolute and/or sliding expiration, then the item will `theoretically` remain cached indefinitely.

member.name: T:Nano.Data.Abstractions.Config.Enums.QuerySplitBehavior
member.summary: Indicates how the related collections in a query should be loaded from database.

member.name: F:Nano.Data.Abstractions.Config.Enums.QuerySplitBehavior.SingleQuery
member.summary: The related collections will be loaded in same database query as parent query.
member.remarks: This behavior generally guarantees result consistency in the face of concurrent updates (but details may vary based on the database and transaction isolation level in use). However, this can cause performance issues when the query loads multiple related collections.

member.name: F:Nano.Data.Abstractions.Config.Enums.QuerySplitBehavior.SplitQuery
member.summary: The related collections will be loaded in separate database queries from the parent query.
member.remarks: This behavior can significantly improve performance when the query loads multiple collections. However, since separate queries are used, this can result in inconsistent results when concurrent updates occur. Serializable or snapshot transactions can be used to mitigate this and achieve consistency with split queries, but that may bring other performance costs and behavioral difference.

member.name: P:Nano.Data.Abstractions.Config.UserOptions.AllowedUserNameCharacters
member.summary: Allowed User Name Characters. Defaults to abcdefghijklmnopqrstuvwxyzABCDEFGHIJKLMNOPQRSTUVWXYZ0123456789-._@+

member.name: F:Nano.Data.Abstractions.Consts.IdentityDefaults.DEFAULT_APP_ID
member.summary: Default app id using with jwt authentication.

member.name: T:Nano.Data.Abstractions.Eventing.Annotations.PublishAttribute
member.summary: Publish Attribute. Types with this annotation, defines that an event will be published for the entity when it changes.

member.name: T:Nano.Data.Abstractions.Eventing.Annotations.SubscribeAttribute
member.summary: Subscribe Attribute. Types with this annotation, subscribes to events of the declaring type.

member.name: T:Nano.Data.Abstractions.IRepository
member.summary: (Base) Interface for a repository. Defines methods for the most rudamentory operations (get, criteria2, add, update, delete) on instances of . , and ).

member.name: T:Nano.Data.Abstractions.Models.Abstractions.IEntityCreatable
member.summary: Entity Creatable. Implementing entities are creatable.

member.name: T:Nano.Data.Abstractions.Models.Abstractions.IEntityCreatableAndUpdatable
member.summary: Entity Creatable and updatable. Implementing entities are creatable and updatable.

member.name: T:Nano.Data.Abstractions.Models.Abstractions.IEntityDeletable
member.summary: Entity Deletable. Implementing entities are deletable.

member.name: T:Nano.Data.Abstractions.Models.Abstractions.IEntityDeletableSoft
member.summary: Entity Deletable. Implementing entities are deletable.

member.name: P:Nano.Data.Abstractions.Models.Abstractions.IEntityDeletableSoft.IsDeleted
member.summary: Deleted at. Indicates whether the entity is deleted or not. Zero means active (true) and anything greater than zero means deleted (false). THe Unix-based time in miliseconds is stored, in order for allowing unique indexes with soft-deletetion. NOTE: Only active instances are returned from queries, when filters are enabled (default behavior).

member.name: T:Nano.Data.Abstractions.Models.Abstractions.IEntityIdentity`1
member.summary: Entity identity inteface. Implementing 's having identity property.

member.name: T:Nano.Data.Abstractions.Models.Abstractions.IEntityUpdatable
member.summary: Entity Deletable. Implementing entities are updatable.

member.name: T:Nano.Data.Abstractions.Models.Abstractions.IEntityWritable
member.summary: Entity Writable. Implementing entities are creatable, updatable and deletable. Implements , and .
